title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus GPU cluster. The analysis argues Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to competitors, relying on external partners for chips and infrastructure. The commentary suggests the AI race is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenters rather than model benchmarks.
